$comment: Coverage ratchet (plan/overhaul/README.md §4 rule 3 + rule 8): totals may never drop below this baseline. Re-baselined UPWARD at the P9 ratchet/deletion audit (2026-06-12) from the Phase 0 floor (lines 65.3 / statements 64.04 / functions 58.65 / branches 56.08 — 253 test files, 1863 tests) to the end-state numbers below (306 test files, 3087 tests; the contract/fixture/parity tiers + the strangler rewrites carried every metric up ~10pts). Generated with `npm run coverage` (vitest run --coverage, @vitest/coverage-v8; settings in vitest.config.ts: include src/**/*.{ts,tsx}, exclude src/test/**) — totals copied from coverage/coverage-summary.json. Test-consolidation PRs must re-run `npm run coverage` and show these totals did not drop; regenerate this file (and explain the delta) in the same PR when coverage legitimately moves.
